title: Agent Auth Reset
scenario: Tight auth reset flow with clear verification and risk coverage.
candidate:
# Agent Auth Reset

## Why

Password reset is error-prone for small teams using shared environments.

## Problem

Agents cannot guide password reset safely when the reset flow lacks clear boundaries and verification.

## Goals

- make password reset safe and clear
- keep the reset path local-first and supportable

## Non-Goals

- redesigning all account settings
- adding hosted auth dependencies

## Constraints

- keep the flow local-first
- avoid extra artifact types

## Solution Shape

Add a reset request screen, a token verification step, and a bounded admin fallback.

## Flows

1. Open the reset request screen.
2. Submit the reset form.
3. Follow the token verification step.

## Data / Interfaces

- reset token payload
- local reset audit log

## Risks / Open Questions

- token expiry failures
- admin fallback misuse
- rollback if the token validation path regresses

## Rollout

- ship behind a flag
- monitor reset failures and rollback on elevated error rate

## Verification

- run focused auth reset tests
- manually verify the reset screen flow end to end

## Story Breakdown

- request reset token
- validate token
- confirm password change
